# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind City Map Updates: District 01 Gets Smarter
- Summary: Highlighting recent District 01 map and scene enhancements that improve mobile visibility and walking interactions in CodeGrind.
- Slug: codegrind-engagement-city-map-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-engagement-city-map-updates

## Brief

- Core message: We’ve shipped CityMap and CityScene improvements for District 01, including mobile shell visibility management and smoother walking interactions, plus tighter integration with the CodeGrind UI. This keeps players engaged with clearer navigation and responsive scenes as they practice DSA within the platform.
- CTA: Explore the updated District 01 map and share your experience with the new mobile-friendly interactions.
- Visual brief: Static UI update: District 01 map and CityScene components with improved mobile visibility controls, new walkway interactions, cyberpunk aesthetic cues, clean captions overlay describing changes

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
